title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Saudi Arabia SASO technical regulations, SABER platform PCoC/SCoC requirements, IEC 62619, IEC 62933, SEC grid code, civil defence fire installation, EMC, and transport requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与沙特阿拉伯SASO技术法规、SABER平台PCoC/SCoC要求、IEC 62619、IEC 62933、SEC电网规范、民防消防安装、EMC及运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與沙特阿拉伯SASO技術法規、SABER平台PCoC/SCoC要求、IEC 62619、IEC 62933、SEC電網規範、民防消防安裝、EMC及運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, fire-code approval, hazardous-materials determination, customs determination, utility approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Saudi Arabia SASO technical regulations, SABER platform requirements, SEC grid code, ECRA licensing, Civil Defence installation approvals, and transport requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、消防规范批准、危险材料裁定、海关裁定、电力公司批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行沙特阿拉伯SASO技术法规、SABER平台要求、SEC电网规范、ECRA许可、民防安装审批及运输要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、消防規範批准、危險材料裁定、海關裁定、電力公司批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行沙特阿拉伯SASO技術法規、SABER平台要求、SEC電網規範、ECRA許可、民防安裝審批及運輸要求。

answer_first.en: IEC 62619 system certification via SABER PCoC, SEC Grid Code compliance, Saudi Civil Defence installation approval, and SASO EMC PCoC are the main gaps beyond Chinese GB battery-safety compliance for BESS exported from China to Saudi Arabia.
answer_first.zh: 通过SABER PCoC取得的IEC 62619系统认证、SEC电网规范合规、沙特民防安装审批以及SASO EMC PCoC，是中国BESS出口沙特阿拉伯相较于中国GB电池安全合规的主要差距。
answer_first.zht: 通過SABER PCoC取得的IEC 62619系統認證、SEC電網規範合規、沙特民防安裝審批以及SASO EMC PCoC，是中國BESS出口沙特阿拉伯相較於中國GB電池安全合規的主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, Saudi authority, IEC, UN, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
